description: Bill of release. Dated: 15 Kislev 1525 Seleucid = 29 November 1213 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides (with the title "Nagid"). Abū ʿImrān Moshe ha-Kohen b. שא[...] (maybe Sheʾerit, which would match the kunya Abū l-Baqāʾ known from other documents) releases his paternal uncle [Abū l-Bahāʾ b.] Abū l-Ḥasan al-Dalāt[ī al-Naḥḥāl] from all claims. Unfinished and no signatures. See T-S 16.89 (PGPID 7389) for the cluster of associated documents. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
